props.ChoiceText: No one named your power aloud, which made it safer, deeper, and much more difficult to remove.
props.ChoiceBio: Quiet indispensability taught you that the strongest household authority is often the least ceremonially acknowledged.

0.TargetText: Too many people in the house now rely on you for you to vanish cleanly.
0.TransitionText: Because quiet indispensability taught you that the strongest household authority is often the least ceremonially acknowledged, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone in service still acts as though the house cannot be imagined without you in it.
